revision.comment:
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「
* {{Pathnav|千葉県の建築物|千葉市の建築物}} * {{Pathnav|千葉市|千葉市の区|稲毛区}}
[[千葉県]]...」
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|千葉県の建築物|千葉市の建築物}} * {{Pathnav|千葉市|千葉市の区|稲毛区}}
[[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[稲毛区]]の[[建築物]]のカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:いなけく}} [[Category:千葉市の建築物|*いなけく]] [[Category:稲毛区|けんちくふつ]] {{座標一覧}}

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:稲毛区の建築物]] [[zh:Category:稻毛區建築物]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Inage Asama Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Categories to be renamed]]{{citation needed|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:稲毛区の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Inage Ward]]: Merge [[Category:稲毛区の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Inage Ward]] via bot
Merge [[Category:千葉市の区の建築物]] into [[Category:Buildings in Wards of Chiba City]] via bot
Removing from [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|千葉県の建築物|千葉市の建築物}} * {{Pathnav|千葉市|千葉市の区|稲毛区}} }} [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[稲毛区]]の[[建築物]]のカテゴリ。
{{citation needed|いなけく}}
{{座標一覧}}
==Old Content==
==15T06:23:25Z==
.
==Categories==
{{translated page|ja|Category:稲毛区の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:稲毛区の建築物|version=88350785}} [[Category:Buildings in Wards of Chiba City]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Inage-ku, Chiba]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Buildings in Wards of Chiba City]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Inage-ku, Chiba]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[ja:Category:稲毛区の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Inage Asama Shrine]] [[zh:Category:稻毛區建築物]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28199409)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28199409)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|千葉県の建築物|千葉市の建築物}}
* {{Pathnav|千葉市|千葉市の区|稲毛区}}
}}
{{citation needed|いなけく}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:稲毛区の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:稲毛区の建築物|version=88350785}}
{{wikidata link|Q28199409}}

}}
